issue_body_preview: This PR fixes the Monaco diff editor rendering bug (text overlapping between panes, TextModel got disposed errors) caused by a version mismatch between the editor core loaded from CDN and the workers bundled locally by vite-plugin-monaco-editor. The fix switches @monaco-editor/react to use the local
test_description_zh: 打开包含 Monaco diff editor 的页面（例如 Schema 对比视图），观察两个对比面板中的文本渲染效果，检查编辑器面板间的文本是否清晰分隔显示，尝试在编辑器中滚动和交互，并观察浏览器控制台是否出现 TextModel 相关错误。
expected_result_zh: Monaco diff editor 的左右两个面板中文本应各自正常渲染，不出现文本重叠、错位或混乱的情况；编辑器交互（滚动、选中等）正常响应；浏览器控制台不应出现 'TextModel got disposed' 或类似错误信息。
